indication: As monotherapy for the treatment of adult patients with chronic lymphocytic leukaemia (CLL), who are treatment naive and have del(17p) and/or TP53-mutated disease.
description: The Republic of Ireland's Health Service Executive (HSE) has approved zanubrutinib for reimbursement as a monotherapy treatment option for the treatment of adult patients with chronic lymphocytic leukemia (CLL) who are treatment naive and whose tumors have 17p deletion and/or TP53 mutated disease.

document.name: Zanubrutinib Therapy. NCCP National SACT Regimen. HSE.
document.description: Zanubrutinib Therapy, 2023, version number 2, NCCP National SACT Regimen, NCCP, viewed 26/03/2026, https://healthservice.hse.ie/documents/6535/708_v2_Zanubrutinib.pdf
